query: 那刚才不通过的测试，可以重新测试，预期是可以通过了对么？

transcript.content: 最短 spot check 我建议就这 2 条： ```bash npm run codex:vscode:gc --silent ```
接下来 我要做蛇呢么？

接下来做这 3 件事就够了。 1. 先留一条最小回归命令 直接用这条做以后 spot check： ```bash npm run codex:vscode:gc --silent ``` 如果怀疑 prompt 没及时落盘，再用： ```bash node scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format markdown --prompt "[GC-D2] 回到编辑器问题。…
或者补一个 repo 内可重复的 smoke/eval case，把 GC-D2 收进固定回归
已经补进去了。 新回归 case 在： - [evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js)
已经修到全绿了。 我做了两件事： - 把 Codex minor GC 默认允许的 guarded relation 放宽到包含 `continue` - 把 `codex-minor-gc-current-editor-update-after-detour` 收进固定 live eval case
继续扩 harder cases，把类似 GC-B 的自然中文多轮切题也收进固定回归

已经把 harder case 补进固定回归了。 新增 case： - `codex-minor-gc-zh-dense-multitopic-return` - 文件：[evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js)
要；尽量不是白名单，有硬编码嫌疑；
已经收住了，而且不是靠白名单。 我做了两步： - 把中文多轮切题 harder case 收进固定回归 - 再把 packaged guard 收紧成“不能覆盖 shadow guard 的否决”
那刚才不通过的测试，可以重新测试，预期是可以通过了对么？

decision.archive_summary: The conversation implemented and validated Codex minor GC improvements: added repeatable smoke/eval coverage, fixed guarded relation handling to allow `continue`, and previously reached green after those changes. Earlier logistics and spot-check instructions are resolved. Durable preference to avoid whitelist-like or hardcoded behavior should be retained.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user turn stays on the same active topic: whether the previously failing tests should now pass after the recent fix. This depends directly on the most recent raw context around harder-case regression additions and the anti-whitelist guard tightening, so keep t8-t11 as raw. Older setup, earlier smoke-check guidance, and already-resolved earlier fixes can leave the next-turn raw working set. The user's preference against whitelist/hardcoded solutions is durable, so preserve it as a semantic pin.
